title: Design & Implement Row-Level Security (RLS)
description: Implement Row-Level Security with 6 realistic roles demonstrating enterprise security patterns. Design phase complete with comprehensive security strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: DAX security filters working correctly for regional and category access
Test scenarios validated with 'View as Role' feature
Documentation complete with screenshots for portfolio
No data leakage (users can't see unauthorized data)
Performance acceptable (<2 second report load with RLS)
dependencies: Semantic model with complete star schema
Power BI Desktop or Fabric workspace access with security permissions
notes: Design phase COMPLETE - 6 roles, DAX filters, dynamic security patterns documented
Implementation COMPLETE - roles.tmdl created with 6 roles
Region column added to gold_dim_country via PySpark notebook
Waiting for Erik to run pipeline (to populate region column) and test RLS
Primarily for portfolio showcase - demonstrates understanding of RLS patterns
